title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at NCC Urban

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at NCC Urban
jsonLd.description:
NCC Urban has an exciting opening for a Real Estate Agent at our Coimbatore office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About NCC Urban:
NCC Urban is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NCC Urban!
